tasks.subject: Task 0: Wire Den + import-tree as ci flake inputs
tasks.description: Add den + import-tree ci flake inputs; thread denCorpus={den,importTree,nixpkgsFlake} via specialArgs. Existing 38 tests unaffected.

metadata.verifyCommand: cd ci && nix flake lock && nix flake check
acceptanceCriteria: existing 38 tests still green; nixpkgs stays 567a49d

tasks.subject: Task 1: Den-template fixture + runDenTemplate adapter
tasks.description: lib/corpus/den-template.nix (mk -> fx) + adapter.runDenTemplate (import raw template outputs, doctor inputs.nixpkgs.lib=engine.lib, return hostOf out) + register denTemplate in corpus/default.nix.

metadata.verifyCommand: cd ci && nix eval --impure --expr 'let f=builtins.getFlake (toString ./.); np=f.inputs.nixpkgs; hola=import ../. {lib=np.lib;}; dc={den=f.inputs.den;importTree=f.inputs.import-tree;nixpkgsFlake=np;}; fx=hola.corpus.denTemplate.mk dc; in (hola.adapter.runDenTemplate hola.adapter.engines.engine fx).config.system.build.toplevel.drvPath'
acceptanceCriteria: corpus.denTemplate.mk returns gate=drvPath fx with template/host/inputs data

tasks.subject: Task 2: Den-template parity gate (byte-identity proof)
tasks.description: ci/tests/den-parity.nix: drvPathGate{runDenTemplate vanilla, runDenTemplate engine}.identical==true. If not identical: real finding (spec §4), parity.locate, do NOT silence.

acceptanceCriteria: den-parity.den-template asserts drvPathGate{runDenTemplate vanilla, runDenTemplate engine}.identical==true
nix flake check green, test count -> 39
if not identical: report finding via parity.locate, do NOT mark complete with red gate
